translation: Group calls on unlicensed servers are only available in DMs.

We highly recommend [deploying the RTCD service](https://mattermost.com/pl/calls-deployment-the-rtcd-service) to offload calls processing to a separate instance in order to preserve your main workspace server performance, scalability and reliability.
Your installation is experiencing heavy use of workspace Calls which can negatively affect system performance and responsiveness.

We highly recommend upgrading to [Enterprise](https://mattermost.com/pricing/) and [deploying the RTCD service](https://mattermost.com/pl/calls-deployment-the-rtcd-service) to offload calls processing to a separate instance in order to preserve your main workspace server performance, scalability and reliability.

We highly recommend switching to [Workspace Enterprise Edition](https://mattermost.com/pl/install-enterprise-install-upgrade) and [deploying the RTCD service](https://mattermost.com/pl/calls-deployment-the-rtcd-service) to offload calls processing to a separate instance in order to preserve your main Workspace server performance, scalability and reliability.
